# Alchemist's Orchid — Potions Color Palette

<!-- GENERATED by scripts/compile-themes.sh --docs from .potions/themes/*/*.tokens.json.
     DO NOT EDIT. Edit the .tokens.json sources and run: scripts/compile-themes.sh --docs -->

**Source of truth:** `.potions/themes/<id>/*.tokens.json` (W3C DTCG), compiled to the
flat `*.theme` runtime format consumed by the Potions theme generator.

**Switch the active theme:**

```sh
potions theme list                          # see installed themes
potions theme set alchemists-orchid white   # switch theme/variant
potions theme cycle                         # next variant
```

## ANSI slot mapping

The Zellij theme, the Alacritty color file, and the shell OSC repaint map
ANSI slots to semantic tokens consistently across variants:

| ANSI slot | Token |
|-----------|-------|
| `fg` | `color.on-surface` |
| `bg` | `color.surface` |
| `black` | `color.surface-deep` |
| `red` | `color.error` |
| `green` | `color.accent-nature` |
| `yellow` | `color.accent-warm` |
| `blue` | `color.accent-cool` |
| `magenta` | `color.primary` |
| `cyan` | `color.primary-deep` |
| `white` | `color.muted` |
| `orange` (zellij) | `color.primary-mid` |
